Massive bunker-buster strikes near Isfahan — largest secondary explosions of the war. Isfahan steel plant struck for second time. Military installations in mountainous area targeted.
IAF precision strike killing IRGC Quds Force engineering chief Mahdi Vafaei, responsible for Hezbollah's tunnel network for 20 years.
Iran launched 10 ballistic missiles at central Israel during Passover Seder. 14 wounded including 11-year-old girl. 9 impact sites. Cluster warheads used.
US-Israeli airstrikes on Hengam Island in the Strait of Hormuz, part of Iran's strategic arch defense island chain.
Fighter jets bombed Shahid Haqqani passenger pier. Qeshm Island desalination plant also knocked out of service.
Strike hit a Shia religious site in northwestern city of Zanjan.
Strike on Tofigh Daru Research and Engineering Company — cancer drug and pharmaceutical facility. IDF claims facility also served as fentanyl supplier to SPND.
Iranian drones struck KAFCO fuel tanks at Kuwait International Airport, causing massive fire. Airport remains closed to civilian operations.

Iranian ballistic missile with cluster warhead struck ultra-Orthodox city of Bnei Brak during Passover eve. 14 wounded including 11-year-old girl in critical condition. Shrapnel from fragmentation warhead damaged buildings. Impact sites also in Rosh HaAyin and Petah Tikva.

Overnight cluster bomblet from Iranian missile salvo struck Bnei Brak, wounding 4 including 2 babies. Fragments damaged sewage pipes causing flooding. 4 salvos fired since midnight. Impact sites in Tel Aviv city center.

IAF struck IRGC Ground Forces base in Tehran and mobile command posts. IDF identified Iran relocating command centers to mobile structures — struck temporary headquarters with commanders operating inside. Also hit ballistic missile storage in Tabriz.
Israeli strike killed IRGC Quds Force engineering chief Mahdi Vafaei in Mahallat. Vafaei was responsible for building Hezbollah's tunnel network for 20+ years.

US-Israeli airstrike destroyed the Pasteur Institute of Iran, a century-old medical research center (founded 1920) serving as Iran's leading center for vaccine development and infectious disease research.
US-Israeli strikes destroyed a major bridge under construction in western Tehran — set to become the tallest bridge in the Middle East. Several people injured.

Iran launched three waves of cluster munitions at central Israel between 7:45-9:00 AM local time. 16 wounded including 12-year-old girl (serious) in Bnei Brak, 6-year-old boy in Rishon LeZion, 11-year-old girl critical.

Evening Iranian ballistic missile struck industrial buildings in Petah Tikva between residential and industrial zones. Cluster warhead bomblets spread to a nearby playground. 5 wounded. 11-year-old girl critically hurt. Part of ~30-missile salvo, most intercepted.

Two waves of US airstrikes destroyed B1 Bridge on Karaj Northern Bypass — Iran's tallest bridge. Civilians celebrating Nowruz 'Nature Day' gathered underneath. Bridge collapsed completely. Trump posted 'much more to follow.'
Israeli Navy strike killed Hajj Yusuf Ismail Hashem, commander of Hezbollah's Southern Front, in Beirut's Jnah area. Highest-ranking Hezbollah figure killed since the war began. 7 killed, 26 wounded.
IRGC missile strike on Amazon AWS cloud computing facility in Bahrain. Fourth Iranian attack on Amazon's Bahrain operations since the war began. Part of campaign against 18 US tech companies.
Iranian ballistic missiles carrying cluster bomb warheads struck Kiryat Ata in northern Israel. One man lightly wounded. IDF assessed cluster warheads represent escalation in Iranian weapon types.
Iranian drones struck Kuwait's Mina Al-Ahmadi oil refinery (~466,000 bpd) for the third time since war began. Fires in operational units, contained by emergency teams.
Missile struck a Kuwaiti water desalination plant. Kuwait blamed Iran; IRGC denied responsibility. Damage assessment ongoing.
Israeli airstrikes shut down Iran's two largest steel plants. Restart estimated 6-12 months.
US/Israeli strikes heavily damaged the Pasteur Institute of Iran, a century-old medical research center founded in 1920.
Two-wave US precision strikes collapsed B1 Bridge, tallest bridge in Middle East connecting Tehran to Karaj. Purpose: sever drone/missile supply routes.

city: Western and Central Iran (50 missile sites)
description: IDF struck 50 Iranian ballistic missile sites with 70+ strikes dropping ~140 bombs during Passover. Targeted launchers responsible for recent barrages on Israel.
IDF precision airstrike eliminated Makram Atimi, commander of central Iranian ballistic missile unit, plus several battalion commanders.
Drone strike hit Red Crescent aid warehouse at ~05:30 local. Two containers, two buses, emergency vehicles destroyed.
Iranian missiles caused interceptor debris fire at Habshan gas facility (ADNOC main gas complex). Operations halted. UAE engaged 18 ballistic missiles, 4 cruise missiles, 47 drones.
IRGC struck Batelco HQ hosting Amazon Web Services data centers. Power outages affected banking/airline systems. Also struck aluminum industries.
Unintercepted Iranian missile cratered near Petah Tikva school. Cluster bomblets hit homes/roads in Ramat Gan, Givat Shmuel, Petah Tikva. Part of 5 separate salvos (~30 missiles).
IDF struck bridges over Litani River in western Bekaa. Total destroyed Litani crossings reaches 8, isolating western Bekaa from rest of Lebanon.

city: Bnei Brak / Petah Tikva / Rosh HaAyin
description: Iranian ballistic missile barrage with cluster munitions — 15 impact sites across Tel Aviv metro area. Fires in buildings and vehicles. 1 lightly wounded in Bnei Brak.
Iranian missile struck Neot Hovav industrial zone south of Beersheba causing fire. No hazardous leaks reported. Part of overnight 15-impact barrage.
Israeli strikes on Hezbollah infrastructure in Beirut southern suburbs. Two loud explosions reported by AFP. Evacuation warnings issued.
Israel destroyed Sohmor-Mashghara bridge linking eastern Lebanon communities. 6th+ Litani River crossing cut, further isolating Bekaa Valley.
Projectile struck perimeter of Bushehr Nuclear Power Plant — 4th attack since Feb 28. 1 security guard killed, auxiliary building damaged. IAEA confirmed no radiation increase.
US-Israeli strikes hit Mahshahr Special Petrochemical Zone. 6 plants struck: Fajr 1&2, Rejal, Amir Kabir, Abou Ali, Bandar-e Imam Khomeini. Iran's 2nd-largest petrochemical complex.
IDF Navy struck Ramada Hotel in Raouche district, Beirut. 5 senior IRGC Quds Force commanders killed: Hosseini, Biazar, Rasouli, Ahmadlou, Abu Mohammad Ali.
Overnight Israeli strikes destroyed 2 buildings near Lebanese Italian Hospital in Tyre. Hospital windows shattered, ceilings collapsed. 11 injured.
Oracle HQ in Dubai Internet City damaged by Iranian drone or interception debris. IRGC claimed targeting Oracle's data center. UAE says debris from interception. No injuries.
4th strike on Bushehr Nuclear Power Plant vicinity. Projectile hit auxiliary building. 1 IAEA guard killed. No radiation increase. Russia evacuated 198 Rosatom staff.
US-Israeli airstrikes hit Mahshahr Special Petrochemical Zone — Fajr 1&2, Rejal, Abu Ali, Bandar Imam. 5 killed, 170 wounded.
Iranian ballistic missiles with cluster warheads. 2 submunitions near IDF Kirya HQ. 10+ impacts across Tel Aviv, Ramat Gan, Bnei Brak, Petah Tikva.
Israeli strikes on Hezbollah infrastructure in Dahiyeh. AFP confirmed 2 explosions, smoke visible.
Strikes near Lebanese Italian Hospital. 2 buildings destroyed, hospital damaged. 11-storey building NE of Tyre destroyed. 2 girls killed in Habbush. 40 wounded.
Bridge destroyed to cut Hezbollah supply lines from Bekaa Valley. Israel warned in advance.
Drone attack on Shuwaikh oil sector complex. Fire at Kuwait Petroleum Corp/Ministry of Oil building. Fire contained, no injuries.

US commando rescue operation to extract downed F-15E WSO. Firefight with Iranian forces. 5 Iranians killed. US destroyed 2 stranded C-130 transports at makeshift airbase. 1 Black Hawk struck but exited airspace.
IDF strikes on Beheshti University medical research institute — nearly destroyed. Part of 272-strike wave across 14 Iranian provinces causing 184 casualties.
Iranian drone attacks damaged two power and water desalination plants in Kuwait. Kuwait Petroleum Corp HQ caught fire. No injuries.
Iranian ballistic missile struck Neot Hovav chemical industrial zone south of Be'er Sheva. Hazmat leak, 3 specialized teams deployed. 1 lightly wounded. Repeat strike on facility.
Iranian drone struck BAPCO Energies storage tank. Large fireball — fire contained and extinguished. No injuries.
UAE engaged 9 ballistic missiles, 1 cruise missile, 50 drones from Iran targeting aluminum industries. All engaged by air defense.

Iranian ballistic missile (400 kg warhead) scored direct hit on residential building in Haifa. NOT intercepted. Building partially collapsed. 4 injured (1 critical), 3-4 missing under rubble. Warhead may not have detonated.
Israeli airstrike on Beirut's Jnah neighbourhood, approximately 100m from Rafik Hariri University Hospital. 4 killed, 39 wounded. Part of wider strikes killing 14 across Lebanon.
Israeli strikes across southern Lebanon killed 10 people including a family of 6. Part of wider Day 37 strikes.
Iranian ballistic missile direct hit on 7-story residential building. 2 dead, 2 missing, 24 wounded.
Ballistic missile with cluster bomb warhead. Submunitions spread across residential area. Woman seriously injured.
Israeli airstrike on town after forced evacuation order. 7 killed including 4yo girl and soldier. 8+ homes destroyed.
Airstrike 100m from Rafik Hariri University Hospital. 4 killed, 39 wounded.
Targeted Israeli strike at dawn killed IRGC Intelligence Chief Maj. Gen. Majid Khademi and Quds Force Unit 840 commander Asghar Bagheri. Biggest decapitation since Soleimani 2020.
Israeli strikes destroyed South Pars petrochemical facility. 85% of Iran's petrochemical exports now offline. 5 killed, 170 injured.
US-Israeli strike on Sharif University of Technology Electronics Research Center. Gas distribution infrastructure damaged. No casualties at university.

Iranian ballistic missile with cluster munitions. 28+ bomblet impact sites. 2 killed (elderly couple in Ramat Gan), 1 moderately wounded. Heavy building damage. High-voltage line damaged in Rosh Ha'ayin.
Overnight residential strike. 13 killed including 4 girls and 2 boys under age 10.
Strike on unidentified target in Alborz province. 18 killed including 2 infants, 24 injured.
Airstrikes on Shahriar. 9 killed.
Strike on adjacent residential building completely destroyed the Rafi-Nia Synagogue — one of the most important Khorasan Jewish gathering places. Hebrew books scattered in rubble.
New explosions reported on Kharg Island — Iran's main oil export terminal (~90% of Iran's oil exports). Iranian state media confirmed attacks. No confirmed damage to oil infrastructure.
IDF struck Yahyaabad railway bridge near Kashan. 2 killed, 3 injured. Part of 10-bridge/railway infrastructure campaign.
IDF struck Tabriz-Zanjan Highway bridge in NW Iran to disrupt missile launcher transport.
Strike on bridge on Qom's communication lines, west of city. Deputy governor confirmed 'American and Zionist enemy projectiles.'
IDF struck petrochemical compound in Shiraz — 'one of last remaining nitric acid production sites' critical for explosives and ballistic missiles. No casualties per Iranian media.
IDF precision strike eliminated Makram Atimi, commander of central ballistic missile unit. Several battalion commanders also killed.
IDF struck and destroyed a mobile ballistic missile launcher truck in Tabriz area.
US CENTCOM confirmed 50+ military targets struck — bunkers, storage, air defense systems. Oil infrastructure NOT targeted per officials.
IRGC launched 11 ballistic missiles and 18 drones at Saudi Eastern Province. All missiles intercepted but debris struck SABIC petrochemical complex at Jubail Industrial City, igniting fire.
IDF struck Arvan Shipbuilding Company and Shahid Mahdavi Marine Industries — produce 80% of IRGC Navy surface combatants. Smoke plumes visible 20km away.
IDF struck IRGC headquarters and Iranian police headquarters in the Natanz area of Isfahan Province.
Joint IAF/Navy operation struck Iran's central sonar production facility — used for design, research, and production of sonar systems for Iran's submarine fleet.
IDF struck petrochemical compound — 'one of last remaining sites producing nitric acid for ballistic missile explosives.' IDF claims 85%+ of Iran's petrochemical export capacity now inoperable.
6 Iranian BM salvos with cluster munitions targeting central Israel. ~50 submunition impact sites across Petah Tikva, Ramat Gan, Bnei Brak. 6 wounded.
Iranian drone strike hit Ali Al Salem Air Base in Kuwait overnight. 15 American service members wounded. IRGC Wave 98 of Operation True Promise 4.

IDF struck 3 airports in Tehran (Mehrabad, Azmayesh, and central IRGC site), destroying dozens of IRGC Air Force aircraft and helicopters. Also struck IRGC HQ, IRGC Air Force HQ, and Aviation Industries Organization.
US military struck 50+ military targets on Kharg Island — bunkers, storage facilities, runways, air defense systems. Oil infrastructure NOT targeted per US officials.
Two shipbuilding companies in Khorramshahr targeted. Part of campaign to destroy IRGC naval production capacity (80% of IRGC Navy built here).
Iranian ballistic missile shrapnel impact in Tel Sheva during post-ceasefire barrage. 4 lightly injured. Part of Iran's missile barrage launched ~10 minutes after Trump's ceasefire announcement.
Iranian missile struck Jubail petrochemical area during post-ceasefire barrage. Part of multi-target attack on Israel and Gulf states minutes after ceasefire announced.
Fire at UAE's Habshan gas processing facility from missile debris during post-ceasefire Iranian barrage. Abu Dhabi air defenses activated. Part of ceasefire violation attack.
Hezbollah fired ~10 rockets directly at Nahariya as part of 24 attack waves with 40+ rockets targeting northern Israel. 6 civilians injured, vehicles and homes damaged.
Lavan Island oil refinery attacked hours after ceasefire. Fire broke out, contained. No casualties due to prior evacuation. Attacker unconfirmed. Post-ceasefire strike.
Iran launched 28 drones at Kuwait in retaliation for Lavan strike. All intercepted by Kuwaiti air defenses. Infrastructure damage reported. Post-ceasefire attack.
Bahrain Defence Force downed 31 drones and 6 missiles in 24-hour period. Two Bahraini civilians injured in Sitra from drone interception debris. Post-ceasefire Iranian retaliation.
Explosions struck Sirri Island crude export facilities at ~06:30 GMT. Combined with Lavan = ~25% of Iran's crude export volume. No party claimed responsibility.
Iranian missile barrage struck Israel despite ceasefire. 3 children aged 12-15 lightly injured by flying glass/shrapnel in Tel Sheva, Negev.
UAE intercepted 17 ballistic missiles and 35 UAVs from Iran. Habshan gas complex operations temporarily suspended after debris fire.
Operation Eternal Darkness: 50 IAF jets struck 100+ Hezbollah targets with 160 munitions in 10 minutes. Central Beirut hit without warning during rush hour. 254 killed, 1,165 wounded.
Hezbollah rockets at kibbutz Manara — first post-ceasefire attack. Sirens also in Shtula and Netua. Hit open area, no injuries.
Hezbollah rocket barrages on Nahariya and Kibbutz Kabri. 7+ attack waves, sirens sounded repeatedly. 3 injured in Nahariya, 1 in Kabri. IDF reported dozens of launches from Lebanon since midnight.
Israeli airstrike on Abbassiyeh in southern Lebanon killed at least 7. Part of broader wave of strikes on Kafra, Jmaijmeh, Safad al-Battikh, Majdal Selm, Deir Antar. Artillery shelling on Haris.

Israeli strike in Beirut's Tallet Khayat neighborhood killed Ali Yusuf Harshi — personal secretary and nephew of Hezbollah Secretary-General Naim Qassem. Strike partially collapsed multistory building. Outside Dahiyeh stronghold.
Operation Eternal Darkness — Israeli jets struck Corniche al-Mazraa intersection during rush hour. Charred bodies in vehicles on ground. Part of 100+ target wave in 10 minutes.
Israeli airstrike killed Hezbollah LRB commander Hamdan in Sidon as part of Operation Eternal Darkness wave.
Israeli airstrike hit a cemetery during a funeral in Shmestar village, killing at least 10 mourners and wounding 4.
Israeli airstrike on coastal town south of Sidon killed three girls.
Israeli strike killed at least 7 and wounded several in southern Lebanon town.
IRGC air defense shot down Israeli Hermes 900 drone over Lar using integrated defense network. IRGC warns any airspace entry is ceasefire violation.
IDF strikes on residential areas in Aita al-Shaab, southern Lebanon. Multiple homes destroyed. At least 7 killed, 15 wounded per Lebanese sources.
IDF strikes on residential areas in Hanawya, southern Lebanon. Homes and civilian buildings targeted in conjunction with Aita al-Shaab strikes.
Israeli airstrike on Nabatieh Serail government building kills 13 Lebanese State Security personnel. Lebanon President Aoun condemns attack on state institutions.
Hezbollah fires missile at Ashdod naval base — deepest strike yet (~90 miles from border). Intercepted. No casualties. Hezbollah claims response to Israeli ceasefire violations.
Israeli airstrikes across Tyre district including al-Majadel. Part of continued non-stop strikes across southern Lebanon with at least 14 killed across multiple towns.
Israeli dawn airstrike hit residential building in Mefdoun, killing 3 people. Part of continued operations in southern Lebanon despite Iran-US ceasefire.
Three deadly Israeli strikes in Nabatiyeh district killed 10 people including 3 emergency workers (1 civil defense member, 2 Islamic Health Committee paramedics).

30+ rockets fired at northern Israel. Direct hit on Safed parking lot causing extensive vehicle damage. MDA ambulance damaged. Hits also on Kibbutz Misgav Am, Deir al-Asad school, Nahariya. No injuries.
Israeli airstrike on village near Sidon in southern Lebanon. 8 killed, 9 wounded in residential area. Part of continued IDF strikes despite Iran ceasefire.
Israeli overnight airstrike on Teffahta in Sidon district killed 13 people. Part of intensified strikes after Islamabad talks collapse.
Israeli airstrike on Qana al-Khashna area killed 5 people. Residential homes and infrastructure hit. Several wounded.
Israeli airstrike on a house in Maaroub killed 6 people. Part of overnight strikes intensifying after Islamabad talks collapse.
Israeli airstrike and artillery shelling on Bint Jbeil. Part of 200 IDF airstrikes in 24h. IDF 98th Division in direct clashes with Hezbollah at town center — urban warfare.
Two Israeli airstrikes on Siddiqin. Artillery strikes also hit Yahmar al-Shaqif nearby. Part of 200-strike wave across southern Lebanon.
Israeli strikes hit a government building in Nabatieh, killing 13 Lebanese state security forces. Bodies buried in Sidon on April 12. Part of intensified strikes after Islamabad talks collapse.

IDF 98th Division + Golani Brigade storm Bint Jbeil. Givati Brigade raids Governmental Hospital — ~20 Hezbollah killed inside, ~20 more in vicinity. Weapons cache seized. All roads to city cut off. White phosphorus and artillery used.
Israeli drone struck Lebanese Red Cross ambulance. Paramedic Hassan Badawi killed, another emergency worker wounded. Workers were clearly marked and coordinated with UNIFIL.
Israeli airstrike on Qana killed 5 people including 3 women and wounded 25 others. Strike targeted homes and infrastructure.

Hezbollah fired 30+ rockets at northern Israeli towns. A kindergarten in Kiryat Shmona was hit (empty at time). Parking lot in Safed struck. 2 civilians lightly injured. Hezbollah claimed response to Israeli ceasefire violations.

IDF 98th Division and Givati Brigade raided hospital in Bint Jbeil where Hezbollah fighters were barricaded. ~40 Hezbollah killed in hospital and vicinity. Weapons cache seized. Stadium captured. 100+ Hezbollah killed in broader operation.
Hezbollah launched 7 rockets at Nahariya. 6 intercepted by Iron Dome. 1 struck residential building, wounding a ~60-year-old woman with missile and glass fragments.
Israeli airstrike on Ma'roub in Tyre district killed at least 4 people and injured 3. Part of 30+ Israeli strikes across southern Lebanon on April 13.

Israeli strike near ICRC center in Tyre killed 1 person being transported for medical treatment. Red Cross vehicles damaged. Israel said it targeted a 'Hezbollah terrorist' and was investigating damage to Red Cross center.

IDF 98th Division (Paratroopers, Commando, Givati Brigades) completed encirclement of Bint Jbeil — historic Hezbollah stronghold. Combined close-quarters combat and aerial strikes killed 100+ Hezbollah operatives. Dozens of infrastructure sites dismantled, hundreds of weapons seized. IDF estimates only 'several dozen' fighters remain in the city.
weaponType: combined arms — CQC, aerial strikes, artillery

description: Israeli airstrike on family home in Jbaa killed a man, his wife, their son, and daughter-in-law (4 killed). One of multiple strikes across southern Lebanon on April 15, one day after historic Israel-Lebanon talks in Washington.
Israeli airstrike on Ansariyeh killed 5 people. Part of multiple IDF strikes across southern Lebanon on April 15 — IDF claims it struck 200+ Hezbollah targets in past 24 hours.
Israeli airstrike on Qadmus killed 4 people. Part of widespread April 15 strikes across southern Lebanon.
Triple-tap Israeli airstrike on Mayfadoun killed 3 paramedics and injured 6. One paramedic missing. Strike targeted first responders who arrived to help wounded from earlier strike.
Israeli airstrike on vehicle in Saadiyat, southern Lebanon. Part of multiple strikes across the region that killed 20+ people on April 15.

IDF 98th Division ground combat at Bint Jbeil. Sgt. Maj. Bianco killed, 13 wounded (10 paratroopers + 3 reservists). 3 Radwan special forces fighters captured. 100+ Hezbollah killed since battle began April 9.

Fresh Israeli strikes killed at least 16 people in southern Lebanon. Two strikes hit vehicles south of Beirut on Jiyeh coastal highway. IDF uncovered anti-tank missile launcher aimed at northern Israel.
IDF airstrike killed Hezbollah coastal sector commander Ismail Baz and two associates near Ain Ebel. One civilian also killed. Targeted killing of senior regional commander.
IDF airstrike eliminated Lebanese Resistance Brigades commander Maher Qassem Hamdan in the Chebaa/Shaba Farms area. LRB is a Hezbollah-linked militia operating in the disputed border zone.
Hezbollah drone strikes targeted IDF 146th Division logistics base near Nahariya and settlement near Liman barracks. Part of 39 Hezbollah military operations claimed in 24 hours.
Hezbollah rocket attack in Bint Jbeil wounded 5 IDF soldiers, one seriously. Ongoing Battle of Bint Jbeil — 98th Division nearing full control.

Israeli warplanes carried out two consecutive airstrikes completely destroying Qasmiyeh Bridge — last remaining bridge crossing over the Litani River. Southern Lebanon (~10% of country) fully severed.
Triple-tap strikes on emergency crews — 3 consecutive strikes hit ambulance teams during relief mission. 4 paramedics killed (Islamic Health Committee + Nabatiyeh Emergency Services), 3 wounded.
Approximately 5 rockets launched from Lebanon toward Krayot area, triggering air raid sirens in Haifa and surrounding regions. Hezbollah claimed strikes on Israeli military positions.
Israeli airstrike killed 8 and injured dozens in Nabatieh area, minutes after Trump's ceasefire announcement. One of the last strikes before the ceasefire took effect at midnight Beirut time.
Hezbollah launched 10 rockets at northern Israel approximately 2 hours before the ceasefire took effect. IDF intercepted 8. Three Israelis wounded, two severely.

Israeli artillery shelling of Khiam and Dibbine approximately 30 minutes after the Lebanon ceasefire took effect at midnight Beirut time. Lebanese army officially reported the violations. Machinegun fire during sweeping operations also reported.

Hezbollah fired 40+ rockets at northern Israel in the hours before the 10-day ceasefire took effect. A 25-year-old man was severely wounded by shrapnel in Carmiel. IDF intercepted majority. Separate barrage also hit Kiryat Shmona area.

Israeli drone struck a motorcycle between Kounine and Beit Yahoun during the ceasefire, killing 1 person and wounding 3 (including a Syrian citizen). First fatality since the 10-day ceasefire took effect at midnight. Lebanese army confirmed the violation.

US forces struck Ras Issa (Ras Isa) oil port in Hodeidah, Yemen — deadliest single US strike in Operation Rough Rider. 74 killed, 171+ injured. Massive fireballs destroyed tanker trucks and port infrastructure. First US attack on a Houthi-controlled oil facility.

city: Gulf of Oman (25nm NE of Oman)
description: Container ship struck by unidentified projectile 25 nautical miles northeast of Oman coast. UKMTO confirmed incident. Damage to some containers, no fires, no environmental impact. Ship continued course. Responsible party unknown.

city: Gulf of Oman (near Strait of Hormuz)
description: USS Spruance (DDG-111) fired rounds into engine room of Iranian-flagged cargo ship Touska (~900 ft) after 6-hour standoff in Gulf of Oman. Marines from 31st MEU then boarded and seized the vessel. First ship physically taken under US naval blockade. Touska was under Treasury sanctions for IRGC links.

US military struck the Ras Issa fuel port in western Yemen, killing at least 74 (some sources report 80-84) and injuring 150-171. Deadliest known US attack on Houthis since Operation Rough Rider began March 15. Targeted Houthi-controlled fuel infrastructure.

IRGC launched drone strikes on US military vessels in Gulf of Oman in retaliation for USS Spruance seizing Iranian cargo ship Touska. Tasnim: 'targeted some American military ships with drones.' No confirmed damage or casualties. First direct Iran-US military engagement since ceasefire.

Hezbollah IED struck an IDF D-9 bulldozer from the 769th Brigade near Kfar Kila in southern Lebanon. Sgt. First Class (Res.) Lidor Porat, 31, killed. Nine soldiers wounded (1 serious, 4 moderate, 4 light). Second IDF death since Lebanon ceasefire.

Hezbollah fired rockets at IDF troops in Rab al-Thalathine area in southern Lebanon — first attack since 10-day ceasefire began April 16. Also launched drone toward northern Israel (intercepted). IDF struck launcher in response. Hezbollah claims 200+ Israeli violations.

IDF struck individuals identified as 'terrorists' who crossed the forward defense line near al-Qusayr in southern Lebanon. IDF stated they 'posed an immediate threat' to soldiers. Golani Brigade involved.

IRGC gunboats fired on Greek-owned container ship Epaminondas ~15nm NE of Oman at ~03:55 UTC. Hit with gunfire and RPGs, causing 'heavy damage to the bridge.' Crew safe. Vessel subsequently seized and towed to Iranian territorial waters.

IRGC gunboats fired on Panama-flagged MSC Francesca ~6nm off Iran coast while transiting southbound. Damage to hull and accommodation. Ship ordered to drop anchor. Subsequently seized and towed to Iranian waters.
IRGC gunboats fired on Panama-flagged, UAE-owned Eurphoria ~8nm west of Iran at 06:38 UTC. Ship stranded on Iranian coast per Iranian media. Tasnim said vessel 'ignored warnings.'
Iran launched four drones targeting Kurdistan Freedom Party (PAK) bases in Khabat district, Erbil province. Three PAK fighters sustained minor injuries.
Israeli drone fired a guided missile at a motorbike on Hay al-Baydar road in Yohmor al-Shaqif (Nabatieh district). Two killed, passing van caught fire from shrapnel with additional injuries.

IRGC drone and missile strikes killed three PDKI (Democratic Party of Iranian Kurdistan) Peshmerga fighters, including two women, in Erbil province. Part of sustained campaign targeting Kurdish opposition parties.

Israeli airstrike on al-Tiri village in southern Lebanon killed 5 people including Al Akhbar journalist Amal Khalil. Strike targeted road linking al-Tiri and Haddatha. Colleague Zeinab Faraj critically injured. Israeli drone dropped sound grenade on rescue teams, obstructing evacuation for ~4 hours.

Israeli strike on Yohmor al-Shaqif in southern Lebanon killed 2 and wounded multiple civilians. White phosphorus reportedly used; several homes caught fire. Part of broader Israeli operations across southern Lebanon buffer zone.
Israeli airstrike on Beit Lahia in northern Gaza killed 5 people including 3 children. Strike targeted civilians near Al-Qassam mosque. Latest in escalating Israeli strikes on Gaza during Iran war.

Hezbollah drone attack on al-Bayada IDF artillery position at 11:00 local (0800 GMT). Hezbollah claims drone hit fire-control facility; IDF says drone intercepted. Targeted newly established IDF artillery site used to shell southern Lebanon villages.
Israeli airstrike on Shoukine road in Nabatieh district killed 3 people despite ceasefire. Strike hit a vehicle on the road. Prompted Hezbollah retaliatory rockets at Shtula.

Israeli artillery shelled the town of Yater in the Bint Jbeil district, wounding 2 civilians including a child despite ceasefire. Hezbollah cited this shelling as reason for retaliatory rockets at Shtula.

Hezbollah fired approximately 4 rockets at Shtula in northern Israel — first rocket attack on Israeli territory during ceasefire. All intercepted by air defense. No casualties. IDF destroyed the launcher and called it a 'blatant violation.'

IDF drone strike killed a Hezbollah operative on a motorcycle between Kounine and Beit Yahoun in southern Lebanon. First confirmed IDF strike targeting Hezbollah operatives since ceasefire took effect.

Israeli warplanes struck a house in Touline (Marjayoun district) at dawn April 24. 2 killed per Lebanese Health Ministry. Followed by artillery shelling. Occurred hours after Trump announced 3-week Lebanon ceasefire extension at the White House. UN warned Israel's strikes may breach international humanitarian law.
IDF struck Hezbollah rocket launchers in Yater and Kafra within minutes of Hezbollah firing 4 rockets at Shtula. Additional buildings struck in Deir Aames, Khirbet Selm, and Touline.
IDF Paratroopers engaged 6 Hezbollah gunmen in Bint Jbeil fortified quarter after K9 unit dog ambushed. IDF used light arms, tank shelling, and explosive drone to kill all 6 within 90 minutes.
weaponType: light arms, tank shell, explosive drone

description: Israeli strikes killed 6 civilians and injured 2 across southern Lebanon: 2 killed in Wadi al-Hujair, 2 killed in Touline, 1 killed in Srifa, 1 killed in Yater. Despite 3-week ceasefire extension.

IDF struck military structures in Deir Aames after issuing first evacuation order since ceasefire began April 16. Claimed rockets were launched toward Shtula, Israel. IDF also dismantled Hezbollah structures, located underground shaft with Kalashnikov rifles, killed 3 Hezbollah fighters on motorcycle loaded with weapons.

Two fiber-optic-guided explosive drones from Iraq struck two Kuwaiti northern border posts. Material damage, no casualties. First attack on Kuwait since the war began. No group claimed responsibility.
Israeli airstrike on Yahmar al-Shaqif (Nabatieh district) killed 4. Part of IDF escalation ordered by Netanyahu to 'strike with force' after Hezbollah ceasefire violations.
Israeli airstrike on Safad al-Batikh (Bint Jbeil district) killed 2 and wounded 17 after Netanyahu ordered 'vigorous attack' on Hezbollah targets following rocket/drone ceasefire violations.
Two IDF air raids struck a truck and motorbike in Yohmor al-Shaqif (Nabatieh district) on Saturday April 26, killing 4. Part of continued IDF operations despite 3-week ceasefire extension.
IDF carried out controlled explosion in Khiam on Saturday April 26. Also struck Hezbollah rocket launchers in nearby Yater and Kafra, stating they posed threats to troops and civilians.

Hezbollah claimed targeting an Israeli armored personnel carrier in Ramyah, southern Lebanon, in retaliation for IDF destruction of homes. Coupled with same-day rocket+drone attack on northern Israel (one rocket and drone intercepted; second rocket fell in open area).

Two explosive-laden, fiber-optic-guided drones launched from Iraq struck two northern Kuwait border posts. Material damage but no casualties. No group claimed responsibility — suspected Iran-backed Iraqi militia. OIC condemned. Iraq Interior Minister al-Shammari announced investigation.

USS Pinckney (Arleigh Burke destroyer) helicopter forced OFAC-sanctioned LPG tanker M/V SEVAN (Panama-flagged, IMO 9177806, ~200,600 bbl LPG/olefins) to turn back to Iran in central Arabian Sea. No shots fired (in contrast to April 19 USS Spruance Touska seizure). Designated as part of Iran's dark fleet April 24.

Israeli airstrike at 3 AM hit roundabout in Kfar Tebnit, Nabatieh district, killing 5 people. Village mosque and several homes also destroyed. Part of broader IDF strikes that killed 14 and wounded 37 across southern Lebanon on April 26.

Israeli airstrikes destroyed a mosque and another religious building in Zawtar Al Sharqiya, Nabatieh district. Part of the broader April 26 IDF strikes across 7+ locations in southern Lebanon that killed 14 and wounded 37.

Hezbollah launched 3 explosive-laden drones at IDF troops in Taybeh. First drone killed Sgt. Idan Fooks (19, 7th Armored Brigade 77th Bn). Second drone was intercepted by soldiers. Third struck nearby without further casualties. 6 soldiers wounded (4 seriously). First direct Hezbollah kill during the ceasefire.

IDF Air Force launched airstrikes against Hezbollah weapons depots and rocket launch sites in the Beqaa Valley — first strikes there in approximately 3 weeks. Beqaa Valley site used for strategic weapons storage and manufacture. Represents significant escalation beyond the buffer zone after ceasefire violations.

Houthis launched 3 anti-ship ballistic missiles into the Red Sea. Two struck the Panama-flagged tanker Andromeda Star (British-owned, carrying Russian oil from Primorsk to India) approximately 15 nautical miles SW of Mokha, causing minor damage. Third missile landed near MV MAISHA without damage. Both ships continued their voyages.

Hezbollah explosive-laden drone struck IDF troops from 7th Armored Brigade's 77th Battalion while repairing a stuck tank in Taybeh, southern Lebanon. Sgt. Idan Fooks (19) killed, 6 wounded (3 severely, 1 moderately, 2 lightly). Third IDF soldier killed during ceasefire.

Second Hezbollah explosive drone attack on IDF troops in the Israeli buffer zone in southern Lebanon. One soldier severely wounded, another lightly hurt. Continued pattern of drone warfare against IDF positions during the ceasefire.
IDF struck Hezbollah positions in Tibnin as part of a 20+ target strike package across southern Lebanon. Part of the first major IDF strike operation since the April 16 ceasefire.
IDF airstrike on Hezbollah weapons storage in Yater, southern Lebanon. Part of the April 27 strike package that killed 14 and wounded 37 across seven towns.
IDF struck Hezbollah infrastructure in Bint Jbeil, southern Lebanon. Multiple rocket launch positions and weapons manufacturing facilities targeted.

Largest IDF strike wave since the April 16 ceasefire extension — ~20 strikes hit Hezbollah weapons manufacturing, storage depots, and rocket launch sites across the Beqaa Valley. First Beqaa strikes in 3 weeks. Some northern Israeli towns canceled school in anticipation of Hezbollah response.

IDF announced demolition of two large Hezbollah cross-border attack tunnels near Qantara — approximately 25 meters deep and 2 kilometers in total length. Tunnels were intended for cross-border infiltration into northern Israel. IDF said the tunnels were built with 'direct guidance from Iran' over a decade.

Hezbollah explosive drone struck an engineering bulldozer operated by Israeli Defense Ministry contractor Amer Hujairat (44) in Aitaroun, killing him. His 19-year-old son was lightly wounded. Hezbollah claimed targeting a bulldozer demolishing homes.
Hezbollah explosive drone wounded 2 IDF soldiers (1 seriously, 1 lightly) in southern Lebanon. Announced April 29. IDF stated this constituted a ceasefire violation.
Houthis attacked MV Cyclades with 3 ASBMs and multiple UAVs over 7 hours. Samad-1 loitering munition scored a hit causing minor damage.
Houthis attacked MSC Orion ~600km off Yemen — furthest Houthi attack ever. EU Operation Atalanta advised 150nm reroute east.
Israeli airstrike killed 5 people including 3 Lebanese Civil Defence paramedics trapped under rubble during a rescue mission. 2 Lebanese Army soldiers wounded — first army targeting since ceasefire.
Israeli airstrike killed 2 people and wounded 13 in Jebchit, southern Lebanon.
Israeli airstrike killed 1 and wounded 15 including 5 children and 5 women in Jwaya, southern Lebanon.
Israeli strikes kill 5 in Gaza including 9-year-old Adel al-Najjar collecting firewood near the 'Yellow Line.'

Israeli double-tap strike: first hit building, second struck Lebanese Army patrol escorting Civil Defense medics. 5 killed (3 medics), 2 LAF soldiers wounded. First confirmed targeting of Lebanese Army troops since ceasefire.
Israeli strike on Jebchit, southern Lebanon. 2 killed, 13 injured.
Two Houthi missiles hit Panama-flagged oil tanker MV Andromeda Star carrying Russian crude, 15nm SW of Mokha. Minor damage; tanker continued voyage.
Houthis targeted US-flagged Maersk Yorktown and MSC Veracruz in Gulf of Aden. CENTCOM intercepted 1 anti-ship ballistic missile and destroyed 4 UAVs. No damage to either vessel.

Israeli double-tap airstrike on building in Majdal Zoun, Tyre district. Second strike targeted rescue workers arriving at scene. 5 killed (3 Civil Defense paramedics), 2 Lebanese Army soldiers wounded.
Israeli airstrike killed Lebanese Army soldier and his brother traveling by motorbike in Khirbet Selm, Bint Jbeil district.
Hezbollah explosive drone struck near Shomera in Western Galilee after sirens sounded. Vehicle ablaze, fire sparked. Interceptor fired at second suspicious aerial target.

Hezbollah fiber-optic FPV suicide drone scored a direct hit on an IDF M548 armored cargo carrier at an artillery site near Shomera. 12 IDF soldiers wounded (2 moderately, 10 lightly). Vehicle caught fire. Drone immune to Israeli electronic warfare jamming.

Israeli airstrike on Sultanieh (Nabatieh district), part of 'Black Wednesday' barrage. IDF Arabic spokesman ordered evacuations within 1km of any Hezbollah personnel. Lebanese Health Ministry recorded multiple casualties.
Israeli airstrike on Qalaouiyeh (Bint Jbeil district), part of 'Black Wednesday' barrage across 23 villages. Multiple killed including 2 children at one site.

IDF combat engineers (Yahalom unit) destroyed a 140-meter Hezbollah tunnel at Ras al-Bayada south of Tyre using 24 tons of explosives. Part of broader Black Wednesday operation. IDF 146th Division killed 5 Hezbollah operatives during sweep.
Israeli strikes on four locations in Nabatieh district killed 15-16 despite ceasefire. 4 from same family killed; 6 killed near village cemetery; Lebanese army soldier killed in Kfar Rumman.
Hezbollah rockets hit Nahariya as part of record 105 attack waves — most intense day since war began. 1 killed, 14 injured. Part of 1,084 total attack waves from Lebanon.
10 rockets fired at Karmiel as part of Hezbollah's record 105 attack waves on May 1.
Israeli airstrikes on multiple villages near Nabatiyeh killed 10+ people, including 4 in a single vehicle strike. IDF issued evacuation order for Habboush near Nabatiyeh.
Hezbollah explosive drone crashed near Margaliot in northern Israel, causing localized fire and lightly wounding 2 IDF soldiers.
IDF announced it dismantled more than 40 Hezbollah infrastructure sites — command centers, weapons caches, military structures — across southern Lebanon over 24 hours, seizing 7,500 weapons.

Israeli warplanes struck a residential building, supermarket, and several homes in Habboush near Nabatiyeh less than an hour after issuing evacuation warnings. 6-8 killed including a woman and child, 8-21 wounded.
Hezbollah explosive FPV drone killed IDF Sgt. Liem Ben Hamo (19, Golani Brigade, 13th Battalion) and moderately wounded another soldier in Qantara village, southern Lebanon.
Hezbollah drone struck M548 cargo carrier at IDF artillery position near Shomera on northern border. Carrier caught fire, artillery shells exploded. 12 soldiers wounded (2 moderately, 10 lightly).
Israeli warplanes struck Zrariyeh village in southern Lebanon, killing 4 people including two women and wounding 4 others. Part of broader May 1 strikes that killed 13 across S. Lebanon.
Israeli airstrike on Ain Baal near Tyre killed 1 person and wounded 7. Part of May 1 strikes across southern Lebanon that killed at least 13 total.
Israeli airstrike on Mayfadoun in Nabatieh district. Part of ~50 Israeli airstrikes across S. Lebanon over 24 hours on May 2.
Israeli airstrike on Siddiqine in Tyre district. Part of ~50 Israeli airstrikes on May 2 targeting Hezbollah infrastructure.
Israeli airstrike between Kafra and Yater villages in Bint Jbeil district. Part of ~50 strikes across S. Lebanon on May 2.
Israeli airstrike on Al Smaaiyah near Tyre. Part of ~50 strikes across S. Lebanon targeting Hezbollah positions.

Israeli aircraft struck near the Syrian Presidential Palace in Damascus in early hours of May 2. Joint Netanyahu-Katz statement warned the Syrian regime against threats to the Druze community. Syrian Health Ministry reports 3 killed, 34 injured. First major Israeli strike on Damascus since the war began.

Israeli airstrikes on al-Tha'lah Military Airbase and other military targets in Suwayda governorate. Part of broader May 2 campaign across southern Syria warning the Syrian regime against threats to the Druze community. SOHR documented 20+ strikes.

Israeli forces demolished parts of a Catholic convent in the Lebanese border village of Majdal Selm on May 2, drawing international criticism and likely Vatican condemnation. Strike on a religious site is part of the day's broader 50-strike campaign across southern Lebanon.

Israeli airstrike on Shoukine (Nabatieh district) killed 3 people as part of 24-hour campaign that killed 41 across southern Lebanon. IDF announced destruction of ~120 Hezbollah sites over the weekend.
Israeli airstrike on a vehicle in Kfar Dajjal killed 2 people. Part of the broader 41-killed-in-24-hours Lebanese campaign.
Israeli airstrike on a home in Lwaizeh killed 3 people. Part of IDF's 120-site weekend destruction campaign targeting Hezbollah military structures and infrastructure.
Jordanian military carried out airstrikes on drugs and weapons storage in Sweida province. Targeted headquarters in Shahba village and at least five locations including warehouses in Arman.

Northbound bulk carrier (likely Liberian-flagged Minoan Falcon per AIS) attacked by multiple small craft 11 nautical miles west of Sirik, Iran at 11:30 UTC. UKMTO confirmed advisory. All crew safe. First confirmed attack in this area since April 22.

Hezbollah explosive drone landed in northern Israel near Margaliot causing fire. Two Israeli soldiers lightly wounded in a separate drone impact. Hezbollah also fired rockets at IDF positions; one was intercepted with no other Israeli injuries.
IDF bulldozers demolished parts of the Convent of the Sisters of the Holy Saviour, a Catholic convent in border village Yaroun. The IDF admitted damaging the site but disputes 'demolition' claim.
